records.alert: Model is projecting 62,314 units over the next 26 weeks; the plan has 94,500 (32,186 over, -34%). If orders cool off as the model expects, that's overstock building at Amazon. Heads-up: the plan is a flat 3,750/wk placeholder — looks like a copy-paste rather than a week-by-week build off how Amazon actually orders.
records.baseline_mode: L13 all-weeks avg (default: 1 legitimate zero weeks, fill-rate 109%)
records.ai_analysis:
W1 zeroed - confirmed POs cover 672u. True demand = AI 62,314 + POs 672 = 62,986u (-33% vs plan).

Amazon POS Sales: LW 2,861u, L4W 2711/wk, L13W 2858/wk, L26W 2885/wk, L52W 3177/wk (stable).

Amazon DC inventory: SOH 43,934u · Open PO 20,047u · WOS 16.2wks (overstocked).

AI 2,397/wk (62,314 total 26W) | Plan 3,635/wk (94,500 total) - plan is 34% above AI.
